title: 2026-06-25 Madrid Azulejo Heat Life
summary: Madrid dry-heat set using azulejo blue across La Casa Encendida work movement, Matadero rehearsal, Círculo rooftop formal evening, and a Lavapiés corrala home mirror detail.
summaryJa: マドリードのアルバム。色の軸はアズレージョブルー。構成は仕事場、studio-sports、イベント会場、室内。

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman walking through a La Casa Encendida-style Madrid patio after a cultural workshop, looking toward a colleague while carrying poster mockups and fabric samples, wearing an ivory sleeveless cotton poplin shell, light taupe utility wrap vest, slate cropped wide trousers, azulejo-blue cord belt, blue enamel ring, sheer ankle socks, tan slingback mules, and a canvas tote
images.title: 01 Office Casa Encendida patio cord

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman in a Matadero Madrid-style rehearsal space, smiling toward a near-camera friend while tying an azulejo-blue scarf around her hair, wearing a cropped white rib tank, blue nylon running shorts, sheer black wrap practice skirt, terracotta cropped mesh tee, mismatched sport socks with a blue stripe, lightweight white dance sneakers, and silver hoops
images.title: 02 Active Matadero scarf warm-up

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman on a Círculo de Bellas Artes-style Madrid rooftop at dusk, looking across the skyline in profile and back view while wearing a sleeveless black linen-silk bias midi dress with asymmetrical hem, azulejo-blue beaded waist chain, sheer navy knee-highs, metallic silver slingback sandals, ivory fan clutch, and blue glass drop earrings
images.title: 03 Formal Círculo rooftop watercolor

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman in a Lavapiés corrala-style Madrid apartment after sunset, seated near an open balcony and looking down while adjusting a blue tile-print scarf top, with her face reflected in a small wall mirror, wearing an open ivory short-sleeve cotton shirt, black city half pants, sheer gray knee socks, red-brown Mary Janes, blue glass hair clip, and a woven mini bag nearby
images.title: 04 Home Lavapiés corrala mirror
